nodes.label: Iran
nodes.description: Islamic Republic of Iran — primary belligerent. IRGC-led military operations, ballistic missile arsenal, proxy network across region.

nodes.label: Israel
nodes.description: State of Israel — primary belligerent. IDF/IAF conducting precision strikes. Iron Dome, Arrow, David's Sling missile defense systems.

nodes.label: United States
nodes.description: US military support and direct strikes. Carrier strike groups in Persian Gulf and Red Sea. Intelligence sharing with Israel.

nodes.label: Saudi Arabia
nodes.description: Kingdom of Saudi Arabia — Gulf coalition lead. Concerned with Houthi attacks, oil infrastructure protection, regional stability.

nodes.label: UAE
nodes.description: United Arab Emirates — Gulf coalition member. Al Dhafra Air Base hosts US forces. Balancing economic interests with security.

nodes.label: Russia
nodes.description: Russia — diplomatic support for Iran. Arms supplier. Blocking UNSC resolutions. Strategic interest in energy market disruption.

nodes.label: China
nodes.description: China — Iran's largest oil buyer. Mediation efforts. Concerned with Hormuz disruption to energy imports. UNSC veto partner with Russia.

nodes.label: Turkey
nodes.description: Turkey — NATO member with independent stance. Opposes strikes but maintains Western alliance. Hosts refugee populations.

nodes.label: United Kingdom
nodes.description: UK — coalition partner. RAF operations from Cyprus. Naval presence in Gulf. Intelligence sharing via Five Eyes.

nodes.label: Iraq
nodes.description: Iraq — caught between Iran-backed PMU forces and US military presence. Territory used by both sides.

nodes.label: Hezbollah
nodes.description: Lebanese Hezbollah — Iran's primary proxy. 150,000+ rockets. Northern front against Israel. Political party and militia.

nodes.label: Houthis
nodes.description: Ansar Allah (Houthis) — Iran-backed Yemen militia. Anti-ship missiles targeting Red Sea commerce. Bab el-Mandeb chokepoint control.

nodes.label: PMU/Hashd
nodes.description: Popular Mobilization Units — Iran-backed Iraqi militias. Attacking US bases in Iraq and Syria. Political influence in Iraqi government.

nodes.label: Hamas
nodes.description: Hamas — Iran-funded Palestinian resistance. Gaza operations. Political bureau in Doha. Complicated relationship with Iran post-Oct 2023.

nodes.label: Syria
nodes.description: Syria — Iranian military presence. Israeli strikes on Iranian assets. Russia maintains air base. Transit route for Iranian arms.
